top_weaknesses: AOV/retention lift and confidence figures are uncalibrated guesses with no baseline data (acknowledged limitation but still soft)
Several PDP 'no buy box' claims rest on a captured snapshot that may have truncated dynamic/WooCommerce content rather than proving the live page lacks ATC
Image-optimization specifics (25 images, 7 missing dims) cited to tech_signals.json which is truncated in evidence, so exact numbers unverifiable

Some PDP 'no price/ATC' conclusions rest on wayback snapshots and truncated text capture; the live store may render a buy box, so the headline leak could be partly an archival artifact (report acknowledges this but still leads with it strongly).

Lift/KPI estimates for new-build experiments (samplers, kits, need-finder) are reasonable but speculative; several depend on creating products that may not align with the retailer-routed model the report itself flags.
tech_signals image evidence is truncated in cited material, so exp-4f6c8b3a1d72's specific counts aren't fully verifiable from provided text.
Several AOV/retention lift and confidence figures (e.g. +12-20%, 80%) are asserted without baseline data; reasonable but uncalibrated.
Some experiments (sampler, kit, subscribe) rely on inferred gaps about separate selling that aren't directly verifiable from captured evidence, given the PDP didn't even show pricing/cart state.
